assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and an email address they can verify.
The developer is creating an individual free-trial account rather than joining an existing organization via invitation.
No LaunchDarkly project, environment, flag, SDK, or context exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a LaunchDarkly trial account, integrate an SDK, evaluate a first feature flag, and observe a visible toggle change.

first_success.outcome: An application evaluates a first flag for a context and visibly changes when the flag is toggled and saved in LaunchDarkly.
first_success.observable_signal: After Review and save, the application immediately reflects the corresponding flag variation.

route_selection.surface: LaunchDarkly self-service trial and SDK quickstart
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete account-to-first-flag route only after one SDK and sample application stack is fixed.

candidates.name: In-app Quickstart with developer-chosen SDK
candidates.reason: Official getting-started and setting-up docs require choosing among server-side, client-side, mobile, and edge SDKs; credential type and code differ.

candidates.name: LaunchDarkly CLI setup
candidates.reason: Presented as an alternative guided route to the in-app Quickstart with a different interaction surface.

candidates.name: Per-SDK onboarding guides (.NET, Go, Java, JavaScript, Node, Python, React, Vue, mobile, and others)
candidates.reason: The onboarding index lists many co-equal SDK guides without ranking one canonical first path.

candidates.name: Product-manager UI-only flag toggle
candidates.reason: It reaches a dashboard toggle without the developer SDK evaluation outcome named by the software-developer getting-started path.

required_path.action: Open the LaunchDarkly signup page, complete the signup form, and submit it to start a free trial.

required_fields.label: Signup form fields
required_fields.notes: Official join-account docs say to complete and submit the signup form but do not enumerate required controls. The public signup URL did not expose field labels in the fetched page body.

required_path.observable_result: LaunchDarkly sends a verification email to the address provided.

required_path.action: Open the verification link from the LaunchDarkly email.
required_path.observable_result: The trial account is verified and the developer can access LaunchDarkly when domain matching does not redirect into a join-request flow.

required_path.action: Choose one SDK, install it, initialize with the matching environment credential, evaluate a first flag for a context, and verify a toggle in the Test environment.

required_fields.label: SDK credential (SDK key, client-side ID, or mobile key)
Feature flag key and evaluation code
required_fields.notes: Exact files, package commands, and run steps depend on the unresolved SDK choice.

required_path.observable_result: The selected application evaluates the flag and reflects a saved targeting change.

prerequisites.description: An email address that can receive LaunchDarkly verification mail.
A runnable application stack matching the eventually selected SDK.

external_gates.description: Email verification must succeed before the trial account is usable.
EU free trials require contacting Sales rather than the self-service US signup path.

unavoidable_waits.description: LaunchDarkly must deliver the signup verification email.

platform_outcomes.description: A completed individual signup without domain matching creates a 14-day trial that later converts to the free developer tier plan.
SDK evaluation uses local state so flags continue to resolve offline after initialization.

excluded.item: Reading LaunchDarkly documentation and role-routing pages
excluded.reason: Documentation is evidence for the path, not a measured product action.

excluded.item: Joining an existing organization by admin invitation or domain-matching request
excluded.reason: That path assumes a prior tenant and administrator rather than creating a new trial account.
Free trials are not available on the federal instance.

sources.title: Get started
evidence_supported: Install SDK, create flag, evaluate, target audience sequence
Trial converts to free developer tier

sources.title: Setting up an SDK
evidence_supported: Install, initialize, credential, evaluate, shutdown steps

sources.title: Getting started in different roles
evidence_supported: Quickstart and CLI as guided options

sources.title: Joining an account
evidence_supported: Domain matching versus new trial account

sources.title: Create Your Free Account
evidence_supported: Field labels were not recoverable from the fetched page body

uncertainties.question: Which LaunchDarkly SDK and sample application stack should define the measured shortest path?
uncertainties.impact: Package install, credential type, source files, initialization, context model, run command, and verification all change by SDK.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A corpus-level choice of one SDK (or confirmation that in-app Quickstart picks a default) plus a dated walkthrough of that complete route from trial signup through toggle verification.

uncertainties.question: What exact fields and challenges does the current public signup form require?
uncertainties.impact: Required field counts and possible CAPTCHA or SSO alternatives cannot be finalized.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated read-only capture of https://app.launchdarkly.com/signup listing every required control for the email/password trial route.
